ops.text: {"experiment":"E8-generation","cell":"audit","verdict":"AUDIT (codex gpt-5.6 xhigh, fresh context): no-promote CONFIRMED, tie-framing REFUTED. E8 reclassified INCONCLUSIVE, not a CI tie. Findings: (1) bootstrap CI degenerate at 0/23 -> [0,0] false certainty; exact binomials winner [0.0014,0.2729] vs v001 [0,0.1482]; Fisher exact 1/18 vs 0/23 p=0.439; paired 1/117 vs 0/117 McNemar p=1.0. (2) arms judged on near-disjoint own-fired sets (1 shared row of 18/23) - conditional-on-own-fire is not apples-to-apples; gate ignored its own end-to-end same_direction_over_corrective. (3) controls pass (tie 0.667>=0.50, garbage 1.0>=0.90) BUT both arms report the SAME 24 control judgments (cache key lacks arm). (4) leaderboard.md says judged over ALL 117 - wrong, only fired (18/23) judged. (5) v001 AUC 0.8534 is hard-coded from E2, AUCs cross different validation renders. GATE CORRECTIONS required before any re-entry (E9): preregistered paired gate on a common row set, abstention as outcome, helpful-vs-harmful fires distinguished, exact/paired interval on the arm DIFFERENCE, same-render AUC. v001 stays promoted."}
